package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for auth_or_tenant_extraction_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated auth, tenant, or principal extraction that should live in middleware or a shared boundary helper.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule005NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule005NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule005NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario005Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule005NegativeService, input Rule005NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
